description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a modern, minimalist design. The main body is finished in a light wood texture, while the front features a combination of white panels and a central section with four dark glass or acrylic inserts, likely serving as doors or display panels. Below the glass section are three drawers, each with a small, round metallic knob for easy access. The sides and top are uniformly covered in the same light wood finish, giving the piece a cohesive appearance. The wardrobe stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its clean lines and neutral colors make it suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A tall, light wood and white wardrobe with a central glass-paneled section and three drawers below, featuring minimalist metallic knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing a plain white panel with subtle vertical lines, no visible handles or glass.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light wood grain texture, with no visible doors or drawers.
description_view_2: Front view with four dark glass or acrylic panels in the upper section and three drawers with metallic knobs below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the light wood grain texture.
